name: useResponsive
description: A hook for detecting current viewport size and comparing against Tailwind CSS breakpoints for responsive behavior.
usage_guidelines: Use for conditional rendering based on screen size.
Access breakpoint comparisons via larger/smaller objects.
Breakpoints match Tailwind CSS defaults (xs, sm, md, lg, xl, 2xl).

return_value.type: {windowWidth: number, larger: Record<string, boolean>, smaller: Record<string, boolean>}
return_value.description: Object with current window width and breakpoint comparisons.

larger.description: Boolean map indicating if viewport is larger than each breakpoint.

smaller.description: Boolean map indicating if viewport is smaller than each breakpoint.

Dont: Don't use for simple CSS-solvable layouts
Don't trigger expensive operations on every resize
